codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review of the final shareout/docs follow-up confirmed the packet made both scrutiny evidence surfaces more truthful and reproducible on the propagated branch: recovery-review review artifacts and synthesis were re-anchored to reachable commit ids, and the recovery-local-ci scrutiny synthesis now records checkout-portable validator commands rather than machine-specific paths. The diff remains validation-evidence only and aligns with the packet brief, so this feature passes on reachable commit `27cd612a1f5abfe8576334bd81b591ba2d27c93f` (`validate(recovery-review): repair shareout traceability ancestry`).
